FRONTIER-HEAT_POWER.title: Heat
FRONTIER-HEAT_POWER.description:
If [gold]Heat[/gold] is 70 or higher, add 1 [gold]Burn[/gold] to your discard pile at end of turn.
If [gold]Heat[/gold] is 200 or higher, gain 1 [gold]Body Burn[/gold] per 100 [gold]Heat[/gold] at end of turn.
FRONTIER-HEAT_POWER.smartDescription:
Current [gold]Heat[/gold]: [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
If 70 or higher, add 1 [gold]Burn[/gold] to discard at end of turn.
If 200 or higher, gain 1 [gold]Body Burn[/gold] per 100 [gold]Heat[/gold] at end of turn.
FRONTIER-BODY_BURN_POWER.title: Body Burn
FRONTIER-BODY_BURN_POWER.description:
Whenever you play a card, take damage equal to [gold]Body Burn[/gold].
At end of turn, lose 1.
FRONTIER-BODY_BURN_POWER.smartDescriptio:
Whenever you play a card, take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage.
At end of turn, lose 1.
FRONTIER-SHUMIT_HEATED_FORGE_POWER.title: Heated Forge
FRONTIER-SHUMIT_EXHAUST_SYSTEM_POWER.des: At the start of your turn, if you have at least [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Heat[/gold], lose 10 [gold]Heat[/gold] and draw 1 card.
FRONTIER-SHUMIT_EXHAUST_SYSTEM_POWER.sma: At the start of your turn, if you have at least [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Heat[/gold], lose 10 [gold]Heat[/gold] and draw 1 card.

FRONTIER-SHUMIT_FEARLESS_FLAME_POWER.des: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Heat[/gold] and 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] per 10 [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-SHUMIT_FEARLESS_FLAME_POWER.sma: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Heat[/gold] and 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] per 10 [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-SHUMIT_BET_YOUR_LIFE_POWER.desc:
This combat, you don't lose [gold]Heat[/gold] or [gold]Body Burn[/gold] stacks.
Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] when you play a Skill and [gold]Dexterity[/gold] when you play an Attack.
FRONTIER-SHUMIT_BET_YOUR_LIFE_POWER.smar:
This combat, you don't lose [gold]Heat[/gold] or [gold]Body Burn[/gold] stacks.
Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] when you play a Skill and [gold]Dexterity[/gold] when you play an Attack.

FRONTIER-SHUMIT_STEAM_VENT_POWER.descrip: Whenever you lose [gold]Heat[/gold], deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
